cases.prompt: I changed a couple of plugins — how do I cut a release: bump their versions, tag them, and publish a pinned catalog?
cases.note: core positive — the version -> tag -> pin flow

cases.prompt: How do I record a changeset so this plugin's version bumps on the next release?
What's a good recipe for sourdough bread?
How do I tag a Docker image and push it to my container registry?
cases.note: confusability negative — tag/registry/publish words, but containers, not plugin releases
